_readme: Published worked examples for the Nodal Analysis Studio literature gates. Repo rule (welltest/fluidstudio precedent): a fixture arms (armed: true) only when its numbers have been read from the cited book by the owner or verified against an owner-provided scan. Until then the fixture documents the target and CASE 8 skips it.

fixtures.source: Economides, Hill, Ehlig-Economides, Zhu, Petroleum Production Systems, 2nd ed.
fixtures.section: Vogel inflow worked example (chapter on well deliverability)
fixtures.target: computeIpr vogel/composite reproduces the printed qmax and rate at the example pwf

fixtures.source: Beggs, Production Optimization Using Nodal Analysis
fixtures.section: Beggs and Brill worked pressure-gradient example
fixtures.target: NA2 traverse single-segment gradient matches the printed dp/dz within 5 percent

fixtures.source: Brown, The Technology of Artificial Lift Methods, Vol 1
fixtures.target: NA2 modified Hagedorn-Brown BHP matches the printed traverse within 5 percent

fixtures.source: Guo and Ghalambor, Petroleum Production Engineering
fixtures.section: Gas well deliverability and tubing performance example
fixtures.target: darcyGasIpr and the NA2 Gray traverse reproduce the printed example
NA3 gasLiftSweep optimum matches the printed optimum injection rate
